arts.ttl: Musaba starts: Sheffield Wednesday team news and predicted XI to face Derby County
arts.sum: The latest Sheffield Wednesday team news as Danny Rohl's side gear up to face Derby County in the Championship. The post Musaba starts: Sheffield Wednesday team news and predicted XI to face Derby County appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne can't rule out Derby County striker exit in January
arts.sum: Paul Warne expects to hold talks with Conor Washington after admitting the striker may want to move elsewhere if he is not playing first-team football with Derby County. Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: Derby County defender could make loan move in January
arts.sum: Warne admits that Rooney is down the pecking order as it currently stands but says a loan move in January could be on the cards if the player thinks that move would suit him. Paul Warne has not ruled out a January loan move for Derby County defender Jake Rooney to help him get regular first-team minutes.
